svg.title: Inserting a value at index 1 of an array
svg.desc: Shows an array myArray = [4, 5, 6]. To insert n = 8 at index 1, elements from index 1 onward shift right one slot, which pushes the old last value 6 out of the array. Once the gap opens at index 1, 8 is written in, giving [4, 8, 5], with RAM updated to match at addresses $0, $4, $8.
svg.text: Inserting n = 8 at Index 1 → Everything Shifts Right
